title: Talk → Magazine Slide Deck
description: Turn a talk's content + a short brief into a single-file HTML magazine slide deck. A faithful WORKFLOW-ONLY lift of the 歸藏 slide-deck skill (op7418/guizang-ppt-skill, 歸藏). AGPL source — we lift only the workflow (the stages + DAG topology) and ship our OWN renderer; NO source files, templates, CSS, prompts, or scripts are copied. The skill's long sequential SKILL.md becomes 7 openable nodes: 需求澄清's first question (Style A editorial vs Style B Swiss) becomes choose_style; 规划主题节奏 / '先做主题节奏表' becomes rhythm_table; 挑布局 (layouts.md 页面布局库) becomes select_layouts, running in parallel with image_prompts (image-prompts.md 配图提示词 — text prompts ONLY, no real image generation, placeholder blocks stand in); 拷贝模板+填充内容 becomes assemble_deck (our own renderer emits the single-file HTML); 对照检查清单自检 (checklist.md 最终自检清单) becomes self_validate; and the README's 平台封面 pipeline (公众号 21:9 / 1:1 分享卡 / 小红书 3:4) becomes the terminal social_cover branch. Most of the pipeline is an honest straight line — only image_prompts and the cover pair are genuine branches. choose_style and rhythm_table are judgment nodes you can override mid-run, and the layouts + deck re-render off them. The talk — 'The Quiet Architecture of Slow Software' by a fictional speaker at a fictional conference — is invented and purely illustrative; nothing here is a real person's talk.

intake.name: Intake
intake.does: Frame the deck: ingest the talk's source content + the short brief (audience, duration→page budget, hard must-keep points, color theme, image needs).

choose_style.name: Choose Style
choose_style.does: The first, governing judgment: pick the visual system — Style A (editorial × e-ink) or Style B (Swiss international) — from the brief's tone, audience, and content type.

rhythm_table.name: Rhythm Table
rhythm_table.does: Plan the slide sequence & pacing BEFORE any layout: one row per slide with its theme (light / dark / hero) so hero pages set the rhythm and no 3+ same-theme slides run together.

select_layouts.name: Select Layouts
select_layouts.does: Per section, pick a named layout from the chosen style's layout library and bind each slide's copy/data/image slots to it.

image_prompts.name: Image Prompts
image_prompts.does: Write text-only image-generation prompts (style-matched, target aspect ratio per slot) for the hero/figure slots. NO real image generation — the deck uses CSS placeholder blocks.

assemble_deck.name: Assemble Deck
assemble_deck.does: Render the single-file, self-contained HTML deck from the rhythm + layouts (inline CSS, no external deps, placeholder blocks for images). Our own renderer / template.

self_validate.name: Self-Validate
self_validate.does: Audit the assembled deck against the checklist (structure, typography, image cropping, theme rhythm, contrast, overflow) and record pass/fail per item.

social_cover.name: Social Cover
social_cover.does: Terminal branch: from the same core message, spec a matching social-cover pair (e.g. WeChat 21:9 + Xiaohongshu 3:4) and render them as a single self-contained HTML sheet.

deliverable.description: A single-file HTML magazine slide deck (assemble_deck/deck.html — self-contained, inline CSS, no external deps, placeholder blocks for images), plus the style + rhythm + layout decisions that produced it, the self-check report, and a matching social-cover pair. AGPL source — we lift only the workflow and ship our own renderer; no source files are copied.
